Name: Color-matching task
Description: A visuospatial working memory task in which participants compare the relevant colors of the current stimulus with those of the immediately preceding stimulus and indicate whether they match.
Instructions: Participants viewed series of colored figures and responded using the keyboard whether the relevant colors in the current figure matched the previous figure, ignoring color position and irrelevant features.
Comments: Only the balloon version was used.
Task difficulty was manipulated by varying the number of relevant colors.
Blocks were presented in increasing order of color-set complexity.
